name: protected-content
title: Protected Content
description: Use this skill when commands, paths, URLs, and code blocks must survive rewriting.
triggers: a document contains exact syntax that must not be changed.
rules: Use this skill when a document contains exact syntax that must not be changed.
MUST preserve every code block byte-for-byte.
MUST NOT rewrite JSON examples, shell flags, or exact file paths.
workflow: compare protected content against the original.
